sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 11.4 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.11)

statement.latex: Is it true that the lattice of centralizers in a group is modular if it is a sub\-lattice of the lattice of all subgroups? This is true for finite groups. { V.\,A.\,Antonov} No, not always (V.\,N.\,Obraztsov, J.~Algebra, { 199}, no.\,1 (1998), 337--343). { {Archive of solved problems (11th ed., 1990)}}{ {Archive of solved problems (11th ed., 1990)}}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
